name: Linguine with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sundried tomatoes, packed without oil, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 quarts water to a boil in a large Dutch oven. Add linguine; cook for 7 minutes or until tender. Drain in a colander; rinse under very hot water. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine cornstarch with gradually added broth; stir with a whisk until blended. Add tomatoes; set aside.
3. Coat the Dutch oven with cooking spray; add oil. Place over medium-high heat until hot. Add onion and garlic; saute for 3 minutes. Add broth mixture; bring to a boil. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Return linguine to pan. Stir in spinach, salt, and pepper; toss well. Spoon mixture onto plates; sprinkle with cheese and pine nuts.
